Notice Of Petition/Motion To Enforce Arbitration Agreement And Stay Action; **Court Reporter Fees Paid**
Off Calendar Apr-07-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
Jacob Cutler, Esq., Knight Law Group, LLP, 310-552-2250, JacobC@knightlaw.com, for Plaintiff Lori Kauth,
Dane M. Willis Esq., UNIVERSAL & SHANNON, LLP, (916) 780-4050, firm@uswlaw.com, for FCA US LLC, Defendant FCA, US LLC

Plaintiff's counsel did not properly contest the Court's tentative ruling.

Hearing is held. Argued. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

DEFENDANT FCA US LLC Petition/Motion To Enforce Arbitration Agreement And Stay Action is taken under submission. Counsel for defendant, Dane willis, to prepare and submit a proposed order.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com mailto:maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Petition/Motion To Enforce Arbitration Agreement And Stay Action
Off Calendar Feb-22-2022 Continued To Mar-22-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Deepak Devabose, Esq. for Plaintiff.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT FCA US LLC's Motion To Enforce Arbitration Agreement And Stay Action.

The hearing on Defendant FCA US LLC's motion to enforce arbitration agreement and stay action is continued to March 22, 2022 to enable Defendant to comply with the page limit of California Rules of Court Rule 3.1113(d). The amended memorandums shall be filed and served no later than March 1, 2022.

Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/SRB)
